features: Blades with a curved edge for fingernails and a straight edge for toenails
Both clippers feature sharp, strong stainless steel cutting edges
description: Product Description 1.Lift up and rotate the Clipper lever into place. 2.Clip nails into the desired shape and length by starting at the corners and clipping toward the centre.3.Next, clip the centre of the nail to finish the shape. This will apply less stress on the natural nail and help prevent the chance of splitting while clipping.4.Use the curved Nail Clipper on nails to follow the natural curve of the nail.5.Use the straight Toenail Clipper on toenails to help prevent ingrown toenails. Directions 1. Clean nails and skin around nails. 2. Place your finger on the clipper, making sure the nail protrudes over the edge. 3. Gently press the clipper to cut the nail. 4. Repeat the process for each nail. Box Contains 2 x Clippers Manufacturer Contact Information ZWILLING Beauty Group GmbH, Gruenewalder Strasse 14-22, 42657 Solingen, Germany. See more
